meaning: adj.[地]三叠纪的,三叠系的,三叠纪岩石的n.三叠纪,三叠系,三叠纪岩石
examples: This was towards the end of the Triassic period.
About halfway through that period, known as the Triassic, an asteroid struck Earth.
Dinosaurs first appear in the fossil record during the Triassic period, some 230m years ago.
The dinosaur evolved in the Mid-Triassic, between 245 and 235 million years ago.
The biggest marine reptile on record is a 21m-long ichthyosaur, Shonisaurus sikanniensis, from Triassic Period rocks in British Columbia, Canada.
